name: Christmas Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add sugar to the butter mixture.
3. Gradually stir in vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Blend in flour and salt.
6. Mix well. Wrap dough and chill for at least 2 hours.
7. Lightly flour a pastry cloth and rolling pin.
8. Roll the dough to about 1/8 inch thickness.
9. Cut into desired shapes.
10. Place cookies about 1 inch apart on cookie sheets.
11. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
12. Cool, frost, and decorate. Makes 5 dozen.
